steps.text: In Thunderbird, open Help → Troubleshooting Information.
Under Application Basics → Profile Folder → Click "Show in Finder" — this is the path to enter below.
Pick the mailboxes (folders) Expensor should scan for transaction emails.
INBOX is the most common choice; add others like Promotions or bank-specific folders if needed.

notes.text: Running Expensor in Docker? Mount your profile directory as a read-only volume in docker-compose.yml: - /path/to/your/profile:/thunderbird-profile:ro. The profile selector will then show it automatically.
If no profiles appear in the dropdown, the profile path may not be accessible. Enter it manually or check the Docker volume mount.
